response.justification: Strong candidate with 12+ years experience significantly exceeding the 6-year requirement. Excellent match on primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with demonstrated expertise across multiple roles. Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development at re:cinq directly aligns with required skills. Primary concerns are the ongoing career gap and lack of explicit Nest.js/Vitest framework experience, though these are learnable given deep foundational expertise in the underlying technologies.
strengths: Deep full-stack expertise matching primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with 12+ years total experience across senior/staff roles
Recent AI-agent infrastructure experience at re:cinq plus proven testing/TDD expertise with multiple workshop contributions and testing libraries authored
Multiple backend languages including Java, proven cloud/Docker/Kubernetes infrastructure experience, and clear architectural thinking demonstrated across diverse projects
concerns: Ongoing career gap since October 2025 (7+ months caregiving); availability timeline and readiness to re-engage unclear
No explicit Nest.js framework experience despite strong TypeScript/Node.js fundamentals that would support rapid ramp-up
Limited recent relational database (PostgreSQL/MySQL) work; primary recent database exposure is MongoDB at Optilyz
